title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop app that extends Claude from a chatbot into a full productivity system with local file access, persistent memory, connectors, skills, projects, and scheduled task automation. The video covers seven core capabilities including tools, browser extension, and automation features for workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
